text: When I have flareups of pain, taking the meloxicam with the cyclobenzoprine and a good nights sleep would leave me pain free in the morning. Extremely lethargic the entire next day, even if I took the meloxicam by itself I am supposed to take the tablet once a day, however due to how tired I get for the entire next day, I only take as needed. I did not figure out the problem with this drug until my son had to take it for something and he was totally wiped out as well. So, I really try to use as little as possible, even though I have a permanent prescription for it.
